temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A young, blonde-haired boy in a grey sweatshirt is shown in a close-up, crying in a dark room. His face is contorted in distress, with tears welling up in his eyes. A hand is seen patting his back comfortingly, and another person's leg is visible behind him. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense emotional distress, establishing the boy as a character who is deeply upset and in need of comfort.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, sobbing. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of the boy's crying is the primary audio.)
(00:04-00:05) The boy, still crying, turns his head to the side to look at a teenage boy who is standing beside him. The teenage boy, who has dark hair, looks down with a somber and concerned expression. (Storyline: A second character is introduced, shifting the dynamic from one of solitary distress to a potential interaction. The teenage boy's concerned expression suggests he is aware of the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Crying, accusatory. 2) Background sounds or music: The boy's sobbing continues.)
